description: Document concerning a shiddukh (matchmaking) for a first-time bride in Dammuh, Egypt. Written by Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (Gil; Ashur disagrees). Records a fine for the benefit of the synagogue of Dammuh. Early thirteenth century. (Eve Krakowski, “Female adolescence in the Cairo Geniza documents,” PhD diss., The University of Chicago, 2012, 90, 260; and Moshe Gil, Documents of the Jewish Pious Foundations from the Cairo Geniza, Brill, 1976, 102) EMS
